name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in StateSpace
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N : 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
    /\ turn' = p

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Forks, Philosophers

VARIABLES forkOwner, state

(* forkOwner: [Forks -> [Philosophers -> BOOLEAN]] *)
(* state: [Philosophers -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}] *)

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forkOwner = [f \in Forks |-> [p \in Philosophers |-> FALSE]]
        /\ state = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper: adjacent forks for philosopher p *)
LeftFork(p) == IF p = 1 THEN Forks[N] ELSE Forks[p-1]
RightFork(p) == Forks[p]

(* Helper: philosopher p is hungry if both adjacent forks are free *)
Hungry(p) == state[p] = "hungry" /\ forkOwner[LeftFork(p)][p] = FALSE
            /\ forkOwner[RightFork(p)][p] = FALSE

(* Helper: philosopher p is eating if both adjacent forks are owned by p *)
Eating(p) == state[p] = "eating" /\ forkOwner[LeftFork(p)][p] = TRUE
            /\ forkOwner[RightFork(p)][p] = TRUE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
          /\ state[p] = "thinking"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "hungry"]
          /\ forkOwner' = forkOwner
        \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
          /\ Hungry(p)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "eating"]
          /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT
                ![LeftFork(p)][p] = TRUE,
                ![RightFork(p)][p] = TRUE]
        \/ \E p \in Philosophers:
          /\ Eating(p)
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "thinking"]
          /\ forkOwner' = [forkOwner EXCEPT
                ![LeftFork(p)][p] = FALSE,
                ![RightFork(p)][p] = FALSE]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forkOwner \in [Forks -> [Philosophers -> BOOLEAN]]
          /\ state \in [Philosophers -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A f \in Forks: forkOwner[f] \in [Philosophers -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ \A p \in Philosophers: state[p] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forkOwner, state>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices *)
(* head points to the next element to be dequeued; tail points to the next slot to enqueue *)
(* count tracks the number of elements in the queue *)

Init == /\ q \in Seq(K)  (* sequence of length K *)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  (* initialize all slots to 0 *)

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  (* enqueue 1 *)
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  (* dequeue 0 *)
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(K)
         /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ count \in 0..K

generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> TRUE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ channelState' = channelState

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client
                                            THEN allocated[c] \cup {p}

          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in free
        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = [c \in Clients |-> IF c = client
                                            THEN allocated[c] \ {p}

          /\ client \in Clients
          /\ p \in allocated[client]
          /\ allocated[client] # {}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 # c2
          /\ allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1 - turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1 - turn] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts[n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1
*)

(* --state Merge
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][m], counts'[n][m])]]
*)

(* --state GlobalCount
globalCount = Sum([n \in Node |-> Max({counts[n][m] : m \in Node})])
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ Node \subseteq Nat
        /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)

(* --state Spec
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)
